An Office With a View

Marine Atlantic has been a vital part of the economy and the movement of people and goods between Nova Scotia and the island of Newfoundland for more than 120 years, connecting communities and offering opportunities for personal and professional growth.

Work alongside passionate individuals, receive competitive salaries and enjoy comprehensive benefits. Apply now to begin your career journey.

Competitive Benefits

We offer a variety of navigation positions, including Masters, Deck Officers, Quartermasters, Bosuns, and Carpenters. You’ll be part of a collaborative team, working together in a fast-paced and professional environment.
